testcase.name: test_let_stmt
testcase.failure: tests/test_parser.py:9: in test_let_stmt p = parse("let x = 1;") ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ tinylang/parser.py:175: in parse return Parser(tokens).parse() ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ tinylang/parser.py:57: in parse stmts.append(self.statement()) ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ tinylang/parser.py:64: in statement value = self.expression() ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ E AttributeError: 'Parser' object has no attribute 'expression'

testcase.name: test_precedence_mul_before_add
testcase.failure: tests/test_parser.py:18: in test_precedence_mul_before_add p = parse("let x = 1 + 2 * 3;") ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ tinylang/parser.py:175: in parse return Parser(tokens).parse() ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ tinylang/parser.py:57: in parse stmts.append(self.statement()) ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ tinylang/parser.py:64: in statement value = self.expression() ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ E AttributeError: 'Parser' object has no attribute 'expression'

testcase.name: test_comparison_and_logical
testcase.failure: tests/test_parser.py:29: in test_comparison_and_logical p = parse("x = 1 < 2 && y;") ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ tinylang/parser.py:175: in parse return Parser(tokens).parse() ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ tinylang/parser.py:57: in parse stmts.append(self.statement()) ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ tinylang/parser.py:143: in statement return self.statement_impl() ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ E AttributeError: 'Parser' object has no attribute 'statement_impl'

testcase.name: test_if_else
testcase.failure: tests/test_parser.py:39: in test_if_else p = parse("if (x) { let a = 1; } else { let b = 2; }") ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ tinylang/parser.py:175: in parse return Parser(tokens).parse() ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ tinylang/parser.py:57: in parse stmts.append(self.statement()) ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ tinylang/parser.py:69: in statement return self.if_stmt() ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ tinylang/parser.py:148: in if_stmt cond = self.expression() ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ E AttributeError: 'Parser' object has no attribute 'expression'

testcase.name: test_while_with_break_continue
testcase.failure: tests/test_parser.py:47: in test_while_with_break_continue p = parse("while (x) { break; continue; }") ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ tinylang/parser.py:175: in parse return Parser(tokens).parse() ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ tinylang/parser.py:57: in parse stmts.append(self.statement()) ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ tinylang/parser.py:73: in statement cond = self.expression() ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ E AttributeError: 'Parser' object has no attribute 'expression'

testcase.name: test_fn_decl_is_fndecl_not_letstmt
testcase.failure: tests/test_parser.py:55: in test_fn_decl_is_fndecl_not_letstmt p = parse("fn add(a, b) { return a + b; }") ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ tinylang/parser.py:175: in parse return Parser(tokens).parse() ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ tinylang/parser.py:57: in parse stmts.append(self.statement()) ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ tinylang/parser.py:95: in statement params = self.params() ^^^^^^^^^^^ E AttributeError: 'Parser' object has no attribute 'params'

testcase.name: test_fn_lit_in_let
testcase.failure: tests/test_parser.py:65: in test_fn_lit_in_let p = parse("let f = fn(x) { return x; };") ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ tinylang/parser.py:175: in parse return Parser(tokens).parse() ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ tinylang/parser.py:57: in parse stmts.append(self.statement()) ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ tinylang/parser.py:64: in statement value = self.expression() ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ E AttributeError: 'Parser' object has no attribute 'expression'

testcase.name: test_list_and_dict_literals
testcase.failure: tests/test_parser.py:72: in test_list_and_dict_literals p = parse('let xs = [1, 2, 3,]; let d = {"a": 1, "b": 2};') ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ tinylang/parser.py:175: in parse return Parser(tokens).parse() ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ tinylang/parser.py:57: in parse stmts.append(self.statement()) ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ tinylang/parser.py:64: in statement value = self.expression() ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ E AttributeError: 'Parser' object has no attribute 'expression'

testcase.name: test_call_and_index_chain
testcase.failure: tests/test_parser.py:82: in test_call_and_index_chain p = parse("f(1, 2)[0];") ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ tinylang/parser.py:175: in parse return Parser(tokens).parse() ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ tinylang/parser.py:57: in parse stmts.append(self.statement()) ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ tinylang/parser.py:143: in statement return self.statement_impl() ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ E AttributeError: 'Parser' object has no attribute 'statement_impl'

testcase.name: test_assign_to_index
testcase.failure: tests/test_parser.py:89: in test_assign_to_index p = parse("xs[1] = 9;") ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ tinylang/parser.py:175: in parse return Parser(tokens).parse() ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ tinylang/parser.py:57: in parse stmts.append(self.statement()) ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ tinylang/parser.py:143: in statement return self.statement_impl() ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ E AttributeError: 'Parser' object has no attribute 'statement_impl'

testcase.name: test_for_stmt_one_and_two_names
testcase.failure: tests/test_parser.py:102: in test_for_stmt_one_and_two_names p1 = parse("for (x) in xs { }") ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ tinylang/parser.py:175: in parse return Parser(tokens).parse() ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ tinylang/parser.py:57: in parse stmts.append(self.statement()) ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ tinylang/parser.py:86: in statement iterable = self.expression() ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ E AttributeError: 'Parser' object has no attribute 'expression'

testcase.name: test_else_if_chain_parses
testcase.failure: tests/test_parser.py:112: in test_else_if_chain_parses p = parse("if (a) { } else if (b) { } else { }") ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ tinylang/parser.py:175: in parse return Parser(tokens).parse() ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ tinylang/parser.py:57: in parse stmts.append(self.statement()) ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ tinylang/parser.py:69: in statement return self.if_stmt() ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ tinylang/parser.py:148: in if_stmt cond = self.expression() ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ E AttributeError: 'Parser' object has no attribute 'expression'
